meta.summary: Scanpy 1.12.1 Python runtime and upstream CLI for scalable single-cell gene-expression analysis with AnnData, preprocessing, clustering, marker testing, and plotting support.
meta.description: Scanpy 1.12.1 Python runtime and upstream CLI for scalable single-cell gene-expression analysis with AnnData, preprocessing, clustering, marker testing, and plotting support.

test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; print(md.version("scanpy"))')" = '1.12.1' && python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import scanpy as sc, anndata, h5py, igraph, leidenalg, matplotlib, natsort, networkx, numba, numpy, pandas, pynndescent, scipy, seaborn, sklearn, statsmodels, umap; from skmisc.loess import loess; print(md.version("scanpy"))' | grep -Fx '1.12.1' >/dev/null && scanpy --help 2>&1 | grep -E 'usage:|Usage:' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-scanpy-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/scanpy/share/testdata/scanpy_smoke.py "$tmp/out" && test -s "$tmp/out/scanpy_smoke.h5ad" && test -s "$tmp/out/pca.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" && grep -F 'gene' "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'scanpy' "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Scanpy
upstream.citation: Wolf, Angerer, and Theis. SCANPY: large-scale single-cell gene expression data analysis. Genome Biology 19, 15 (2018).

meta.summary: Scanpy 1.12.2 Python runtime and upstream CLI for scalable single-cell gene-expression analysis with AnnData, preprocessing, clustering, marker testing, and plotting support.
meta.description: Scanpy 1.12.2 Python runtime and upstream CLI for scalable single-cell gene-expression analysis with AnnData, preprocessing, clustering, marker testing, and plotting support.

tmp=/tmp/taf-scanpy-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/scanpy/share/testdata/scanpy_smoke.py "$tmp/out" && test -s "$tmp/out/scanpy_smoke.h5ad" && test -s "$tmp/out/pca.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" && grep -F 'gene' "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'scanpy' "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Scanpy
upstream.citation: Wolf, Angerer, and Theis. SCANPY: large-scale single-cell gene expression data analysis. Genome Biology 19, 15 (2018).
